programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.1m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Three meters at Ribeira with offshore winds; could be worse ways to spend an afternoon.
🌊 Swell: 3.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 16.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 4.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.desc:
